steps.title: Track the clause subject
steps.content: The blank is the verb in the relative clause "that ______ in contact with it." The relative pronoun "that" refers to "nematodes," which is plural.

steps.title: Use the plural verb
steps.content: A, B, and C are singular verb forms, so they do not agree with the plural subject "nematodes." The verb must be plural. The answer is D.
